keyInfo.title: Crew Catering notes
keyInfo.text:
Shifts:

LUNCH: 12.00H or 13.00H  ends at 14:00

DINNER: 19.00H or 20.00H ends at 21:00

Menus:

\- Lunch: 2-course meal (Main & Dessert), Mineral waters or 1 soft, Coffee or tea

\- Dinner: As above + one glass of wine or one beer

Dish of the day OR Caesar salad OR Pasta plate (2 sauces available). Special diets treated separately – as communicated in advance

Space:

Reserved space on the terrace - 2 or 3 tables: total of 10-18 covers

For bad weather services will take place inside (max capacity 16 covers)

scheduleDetail.notes:
You will have access to the crane on Friday 19th afternoon and on Saturday 20th all day (from 9AM to 4 or 5PM), situated in rue Latour-Maubourg. No crane used on Sunday 21st.
Dismantle scheduled on Friday 26th June, crane situated in Henri IV aisle (other side, in the hotel parking area).
